name: shipeasy
description: Shipeasy plugin for Claude Code — feature flags, A/B experiments, event metrics, translations, in-app bug reports. One install, one MCP registration, all features nested under /shipeasy:<area>:<verb>.

plugins.name: shipeasy
plugins.description: End-to-end Shipeasy plugin: base SDK install + auth + bind, plus experiments, metrics, gates/configs, translations, and feedback. Slash commands live at /shipeasy:setup, /shipeasy:experiment:{create,start,status,stop}, /shipeasy:experiments:install, /shipeasy:metric:{create,list,show,delete,grammar}, /shipeasy:metrics:install, /shipeasy:flag:create, /shipeasy:flags:install, /shipeasy:i18n:{extract,migrate,install}, /shipeasy:bug:report, /shipeasy:bugs:install. Registers the shipeasy MCP server. Replaces the deprecated base/experiments-metrics/configs-gates/polylang/bugs plugins.
